Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Modernize homepage with spacious layout and updated categories

- Redesign homepage: full-viewport hero, simplified to 3 clean sections

- Add new categories: Cleaning, Real Estate, Insurance, Moving, Appliance Repair, Locksmith, Pressure Washing, Tree Services
- Replace Gutters category with higher-demand services
- Fix Supabase middleware to handle missing env vars gracefully

EOF
\)")
